user.title: Finnhub Stock Quotes
user.description: Enter your Finnhub API key and the equity symbols you want to track.

data_description.api_key: Your Finnhub.io API key (free tier supports 60 requests/minute).
data_description.scan_interval: How often to fetch prices during market hours (1–60 minutes). May be automatically increased for large symbol lists to stay within rate limits.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Finnhub
reauth_confirm.description: Your Finnhub API key has been rejected. Please enter a new one. Your tracked symbols will be preserved.

error.invalid_api_key: The API key was rejected by Finnhub. Please check it and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach Finnhub. Check your network connection.
error.rate_limit: Finnhub rate limit hit during validation. Wait a moment and retry.
error.no_symbols: Please enter at least one valid ticker symbol.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs.
error.invalid_scan_interval: Poll interval must be between 1 and 60 minutes.

abort.already_configured: This Finnhub account is already configured.
abort.reauth_successful: Re-authentication was successful. Finnhub is now active again.

init.title: Edit Finnhub Configuration
init.description: Update your API key or the list of tracked symbols.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to fetch prices during market hours (1–60 minutes). May be automatically increased for large symbol lists to stay within rate limits.
